[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The CloudGuard data connector enables the ingestion of security events from the CloudGuard API into Microsoft Sentinel™, using Microsoft Sentinel’s Codeless Connector Platform. The connector supports DCR-based ingestion time transformations which parses incoming security event data into custom columns. This pre-parsing process eliminates the need for query-time parsing, resulting in improved performance for data queries

Data Connectors: 1, Analytic Rules: 1, Hunting Queries: 5, Playbooks: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions

properties.displayName: CheckpointHEC_CL On Demand Email Security (via Codeless Connector Platform)

connectorUiConfig.title: CheckpointHEC_CL On Demand Email Security (via Codeless Connector Platform)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: CheckpointHEC_CL Email Security data connector provides the capability to get Check Point security event data

sampleQueries.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
 | where EventType == 'message'
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc

dataTypes.name: CheckpointHEC_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CheckpointHEC_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace are required.

parameters.content: Create an Application in Azure AD and create an application secret and key. To be used latest
Assign the application created the role Monitoring Metrics Publisher on the DRC created

properties.displayName: CheckpointHEC_CL On Demand Email Security (via Codeless Connector Platform)

connectorDefinitionName.defaultValue: CheckpointHEC_CL On Demand Email Security (via Codeless Connector Platform)

properties.description: CheckpointEventPerUser_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| mv-expand User = EmailTo
| extend User = tostring(User)
| summarize Count = count() by User, EventCategory
| evaluate pivot(EventCategory, sum(Count))

properties.description: CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Hunting Query 1

properties.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL 
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| summarize Count = count() by EventCategory

properties.description: CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Hunting Query 2

properties.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
| where EventCategory == 'spam' and TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| summarize SpamDetections = count() by tostring(EmailFromEmail)
| order by SpamDetections desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Search for emails detected as spam

properties.description: CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Hunting Query 3
CheckpointPhishing_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
| where EventCategory == 'phishing' and TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| mv-expand email = EmailTo
| summarize PhishingDetections = count() by tostring(email)
| order by PhishingDetections desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Get phishing email count per user

properties.description: CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Hunting Query 4
CheckpointDLPEvent_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where EventCategory == "dlp"
| extend sr = (email_raw).entity_security_result
| mv-expand dlp = sr.dlp
| extend payload = todynamic(dlp.payload)
| mv-expand scan_detail = payload.scan_details
| extend
    verdict = tostring(dlp.verdict),
    status_description = tostring(dlp.status_description),
    hit_count = toint(payload.hit_count),
    scan_detail = tostring(scan_detail),
    rule = tostring(payload.matches_dlp_rules[0])
| project TimeGenerated, EmailFromEmail, EmailSubject, EmailMessageId, verdict, status_description, hit_count, scan_detail, rules = payload.matches_dlp_rules
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Hunting Query 5
Fetch phishing emails that are pending action
CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration Analytics Rule 1
